form.formComment: Three-year-old filly (Art Major - Robyn Scherbotsky) making her debut. Finished second at Carrick in a trial on March 23 over 1670m. Placed in a recent trial and is expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Sr1) over 2200m at this track, beaten 35 m by Winning Brew (2:45.10) in 3yo+ MAIDEN on April 4 at $18. At the run before was well back in the run when 10th (Sr3) over 1670m after racing wide at Carrick well beaten by Sheeza Soho (2:04.40) in 3yo+ MAIDEN on March 8 at $6.50. Expecting a better run this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke racing out of the back straight on the first occasion.
Raced rough on straightening for the run to the finish.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 7th (Sr5) over 1680m at this track beaten 19 m by Shades Of Silk (2:03.30) in 3yo+ MAIDEN on November 2 at $101. Has been sharpened up at the trials but will be better for this outing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced without cover before giving ground and beaten 204m.
Hung outwards back straight final occasion.

form.formComment: Solid performance when a close second behind Lady Deekaynwhy at Shepparton over 2190m in a 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 3 at $13. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Ohana By The Sea at Hobart over 2090m in a 3yo+ MAIDEN on March 25 at $11. Another strong performance expected.
